name: Baldwin Insurance Group, Inc.
summary: PART I The Company The Baldwin Insurance Group, Inc. is a holding company and sole managing member of The Baldwin Insurance Group Holdings, LLC (Baldwin Holdings) and its sole material asset is its ownership interest in Baldwin Holdings, through which all of our business is conducted. In this Annual Report on Form 10-K, unless the context otherwise requires, the words Baldwin, the Company, we, us and our refer to The Baldwin Insurance Group, Inc., together with its consolidated subsidiaries, inc...
